title: For Chinese exporters, Iran worries eclipse tariff woes as Trump, Xi prepare to meet
summary_full: Heading into the summit, Beijing and Washington will likely reaffirm their shared intention to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore stability in the region.
summary_public: Heading into the summit, Beijing and Washington will likely reaffirm their shared intention to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore stability in the region.
